title: marrubium flavum
intro: Marrubium flavum, also known as yellow-marsh marigold or yellow marigold, is a perennial plant belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). The medicinal properties of Marrubium flavum are attributed to its bioactive compounds, including flavonoids, alkaloids, and phenolic acids, which have been found to possess anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Marrubium flavum include its potential to reduce inflammation, alleviate digestive issues, and exhibit immunomodulatory effects, making it a valuable herbal remedy for various health conditions. Marrubium flavum can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat a range of ailments, including respiratory issues, skin problems, and gastrointestinal disorders.
